name: Thick & Spicy Spaghetti Sauce1
recipeIngredient: 1 (16-ounce) can whole tomatoes, undrained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef with onion, green pepper, celery, and garlic in hot oil in a large Dutch oven.
2. Cook until the meat is browned and stirring to crumble. Drain well.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Cover and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to a simmer for an additional 2 or 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove bay leaves and serve over pasta of choice.
7. Sprinkle with shredded sharp cheddar cheese and grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
